name: paper-source
description: Paper Source finds, deduplicates against Paper Wiki backlogs, ranks, parses, stages, and hands off paper evidence for Paper Wiki-compatible vaults.

interface.shortDescription: v2.6.0 | Paper Source: discover, dedupe, required concept groups, benchmark gates, Grok diagnostics, recall/risk checks, recommend, record.
interface.longDescription: Paper Source is the source/evidence layer for PaperFlow: configure profile-driven discovery, run discover-papers for natural-language paper search, run local fixture discovery-benchmark gates for precision/recall/review-leakage/duplicate/citation/config regressions, deduplicate against wiki _meta/reference-index.json before raw source bundles, record transparent query plans with hard/soft constraints, required concept groups, term_provenance_detail, query-plan diagnostics, and agent/config/Research Brief acronym or synonym expansions, expose plugin-installed grok-search-rs MCP self-registration backed by user-level runtime.json, optionally use configured grok-search-rs MCP as targeted or parallel high-quality supplemental recall without replacing paper-search MCP, diagnose Grok provider/runtime failures, timeout/budget cutoffs, source fallback, page-chrome extraction, weak identity extraction, retry outcomes, and filter/rank non-contribution counts, enrich DOI/code metadata, recover provider-supplied official versions or related papers into recall-gap artifacts, apply provider quality-risk checks for retraction, withdrawal, expression-of-concern, paper-mill, and predatory-venue evidence, apply lexical relevance checks plus normalized citation ranking and config/agent-plan quality-evidence lexicons, apply cross-discipline quality gates with explicit identity/relevance/inspectability/validation/source-confidence/reproducibility/request-risk/quality-risk dimensions, treat paper-search-mcp as retrieval and metadata coverage rather than a semantic quality ranker, emit DOI-required non-Reject session_recommendations for chat-facing reading decisions with quality-risk cautions, zero-primary, required-concept-group, and quality-reject diagnostics, auto-stage selected primary PDF-available recommendations, acquire PDFs or manual-download records, parse with MinerU, recover configured MinerU CDN ZIP downloads in fake-IP environments, preserve source bundles, produce Chinese approval reports, record explicit human or Codex automation approval metadata, hand off via wiki-ingest-brief.json and wiki-agent-trigger.json, and record final wiki ingest. Paper Wiki or another wiki-capable agent owns formal page writing.
defaultPrompt: Set up Paper Source / PS configuration.
Use Paper Source / PS to find, dedupe, rank, diagnose, and stage high-quality papers.
Prepare selected papers for Paper Wiki handoff and record wiki ingest.
